news.title: VEA Statement on Governor Spanberger's Veto of Public Sector Collective Bargaining Legislation
news.summary_en:
The Virginia Education Association (VEA) and the National Education Association (NEA)
issued the following statement today in response to Governor Abigail Spanberger's
announced veto of legislation that would have guaranteed Virginia's public employees the
right to engage in collective bargaining and protections from retaliation when they do so:

news.title: Tennessee’s Clinton Smith honored as NEA’s 2026 Higher Educator of the Year
news.summary_en: The National Education Association (NEA) today announced that Clinton Smith, University of Tennessee at Martin (UT Martin) professor of special education, will be awarded the 2026 Higher Educator of the Year award.
